hibernate-mapping.query: Select transactionResponse from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionResponse as transactionResponse where transactionResponse.Company =:company and transactionResponse.TransactionTokenNumber >:transactionTokenNumber order by TransactionTokenNumber Desc

Select transactionResponse from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionResponse as transactionResponse, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransactionState finTxState where finTxState.FinancialTransaction =:finTx and finTxState.TransactionResponse.Id = transactionResponse.Id
Select max(transactionResponse.TransactionTokenNumber) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionResponse as transactionResponse where transactionResponse.Company =:company
